properties.sql: WITH opening AS (SELECT c_envelope_code AS envelope_code, c_account_path AS account_path, SUM(CASE WHEN c_direction = 'debit' THEN CAST(c_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)) WHEN c_direction = 'credit' THEN -CAST(c_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS opening_balance FROM app_fd_budget_event WHERE c_envelope_code IS NOT NULL AND c_envelope_code <> '' AND (NULLIF('#requestParam.from?sql#', '') IS NULL OR datecreated < NULLIF('#requestParam.from?sql#', '')::timestamp) GROUP BY c_envelope_code, c_account_path), period AS (SELECT c_envelope_code AS envelope_code, c_account_path AS account_path, SUM(CASE WHEN c_direction = 'debit'  THEN CAST(c_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS debits, SUM(CASE WHEN c_direction = 'credit' THEN CAST(c_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS credits, SUM(CASE WHEN c_direction = 'debit'  THEN CAST(c_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)) WHEN c_direction = 'credit' THEN -CAST(c_amount AS NUMERIC(15,2)) ELSE 0 END) AS net FROM app_fd_budget_event WHERE c_envelope_code IS NOT NULL AND c_envelope_code <> '' AND (NULLIF('#requestParam.from?sql#', '') IS NULL OR datecreated >= NULLIF('#requestParam.from?sql#', '')::timestamp) AND (NULLIF('#requestParam.to?sql#', '')   IS NULL OR datecreated <  NULLIF('#requestParam.to?sql#', '')::timestamp + INTERVAL '1 day') GROUP BY c_envelope_code, c_account_path) SELECT (COALESCE(o.envelope_code, p.envelope_code) || '|' || COALESCE(o.account_path, p.account_path)) AS id, COALESCE(o.envelope_code, p.envelope_code) AS envelope_code, COALESCE(o.account_path, p.account_path) AS account_path, to_char(COALESCE(o.opening_balance, 0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS opening_disp, to_char(COALESCE(p.debits, 0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS debits_disp, to_char(COALESCE(p.credits, 0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS credits_disp, to_char(COALESCE(p.net, 0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS net_disp, to_char(COALESCE(o.opening_balance, 0) + COALESCE(p.net, 0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS closing_disp FROM opening o FULL OUTER JOIN period p ON o.envelope_code = p.envelope_code AND o.account_path = p.account_path WHERE COALESCE(o.opening_balance, 0) <> 0 OR COALESCE(p.debits, 0) <> 0 OR COALESCE(p.credits, 0) <> 0 ORDER BY COALESCE(o.envelope_code, p.envelope_code), COALESCE(o.account_path, p.account_path)
properties.countSql: SELECT count(DISTINCT (c_envelope_code, c_account_path)) FROM app_fd_budget_event WHERE c_envelope_code IS NOT NULL AND c_envelope_code <> ''
